content_body: Amazing house! Last year we rented a home in the Atlanta area and it was a dud so I was pretty nervous about our trip this year. We hit the jackpot with "Urban Retreat" - beautiful and comfortable home in a great location. We ate a lot of meals at the home, the six-burner stove was perfect for our cooking. We had a wonderful time and will be looking forward to coming back! Beautifully decorated home nice and comfortable, and super location!
title: Fears Relieved at Urban Retreat
